notableMoments: Qualified for their first World Cup in 2002, only 11 years after gaining independence from Yugoslavia
Defeated Russia in a two-legged playoff to qualify for the 2010 World Cup
Drew 2-2 with the United States in the 2010 group stage after leading 2-0, with a disallowed late US goal
Zlatan Zahovič was their talisman in 2002 but was sent home early after a dispute with the coach
Beat Algeria 1-0 in 2010 for their only World Cup victory
As a nation of just 2 million people, qualifying for two World Cups is a remarkable achievement
